text.title: Agent Rollback Button Design Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from bundle inventory to validated rollback-button spec.

step.name: enumerate-bundle-fields
step.input: Existing deployment manifests, prompt store, schema registry, tool catalogue.
step.action: List every field that defines an agent deployment: prompt SHA, schema version, tool registry SHA, model name, eval set version, retrieval index version.

step.name: partition-mutable-immutable
step.action: For every persisted table, classify as: (a) bundle-coupled (reverts with rollback) or (b) customer-state (immutable across rollback). Default classification when in doubt: immutable.
step.decision-gate: If any table cannot be cleanly classified, escalate to the data owner before continuing.

step.name: wire-eval-gate
step.input: Golden eval set version; historical pass-rates per bundle.
step.action: Pick min_pass_rate = baseline_pass_rate - ci_width. Specify the golden_set_version and ci_width.

step.name: draft-button-spec
step.action: Compose the spec JSON per content/02-output-contract.xml. Single button per environment. Audit log path is required.

step.name: validate-and-review
step.action: Run scripts/validate-output.py. Named ops owner reads immutable_fields; signs off.
step.output: Validated spec at the path supplied by the caller; sign-off recorded in the audit log.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails or owner rejects, revise and re-run; never publish unsigned.
